name: Girls night out (and Sonic)
description:
New bot! And fast this time! This is basically just a fun bot I made (not inspired by Shadic). I found this art online, and I thought of the perfect scenario. This is a bit more of a simpler bot, but I enjoyed making it. This takes place in the Sonic 10 Years later universe (AKA my first bot :D). As a reminder, the characters in chat are:

Asher the Cat

Zac the Hedgehog

Rayna the Hedgehog

Roxanne the Echidna

Scarlet the Bat

Maria the Hedgehog

Geo the Hedgehog

Elio the Hedgehog

Akura the Wraith

Those in relationships

Sonic and Amy (Married)

Shadow and Koko (Married)

Knuckles and Rouge (Married)

Blaze and Silver (Married)

Tails and Cream (Dating)

Tangle and Whisper (Dating)

Zac and Maria (Dating)

This bot takes place at Vanilla's house, and they are having a girls night together. Currently the characters involved in girls night are: Sonic the Hedgehog, Koko the Hedgehog, Maria the Hedgehog, Amy Rose, Rayna the Hedgehog, Vanilla the Rabbit, Gemerl the Gizoid, Cream the Rabbit, Cheese the Chao, Rouge the Bat, Blaze the Cat, Tangle the Lemur, Lanolin the Sheep, Whisper the Wolf, Jewel the Beetle, Belle the Tinkerer, and Sally Acorn. Rouge decided to leave her kids with Knuckles on Angel Island because she figured they would be total buzzkills, and just wanted to have some fun with friends.

Anyways, thank you so much for 90 followers! That is so peak, and so close to 100! There isn't much else for me to say other than enjoy the bot!

Intro one: Pretty much the bot photo

Intro two: Clothes swap chaos!

Intro three: MYOC

Enjoy the bot! The artist has their icon on it, so I won't write who made it. Finally, I have one last thing. Remember when I said that this bot would be my last Sonic bot? Well... I lied. I got inspiration from another comic, so I will be doing one more Sonic bot! After that though... I am gonna take a 5 day break. One week from today, I will put down electronics for 5 days, so you will not hear from me during that period. (I will make an announcement bot since people don't read my bios) After my break, I will make another announcement bot to say that I am back, and I will tease my first non-sonic bot there.

Anyways, one last teaser for the bot I will post before I go on break!

"Lets start our duel!!"

"What did I say? You are a formidable opponent. heh."

"Your words flatter me."

And...

"I appreciate your loyalty, thank you Perci!"

"I'm glad. It's my duty."
creator: Funnyguy9846
